name: Adastria Co., Ltd.
summary: Adastria Co., Ltd. plans, produces, and retails clothes and sundry goods in Japan. It offers women's, men's, and children's apparel; and lifestyle items, including bags, shoes, kitchen and interior goods, and furniture under various brands. As of February 28, 2021, the company operated 1,400 retail stores in Hong Kong, China, Taiwan, South Korea, and the United States. The company was formerly known as Adastria Holdings Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Adastria Co., Ltd. in June 2015. Adastria Co., Ltd. was founded in 1953 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
